home.heroSub: Search any event below to find photos by your bib number.
home.loadErrorSub: Something went wrong. Please try again.

event.heroSubtitle: Enter your bib number to find your photos from this event.
event.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cart.heading: Review your cart
cart.editAria: Edit cart — return to photo selection

email.instruction: Enter your email to receive payment instructions and download links.
email.label: Email address
email.previewText: We'll send updates to — is this correct?

bank.instruction: Transfer the amount below to the bank account shown. Use the payment reference exactly as shown so the photographer can identify your payment.

confirmation.headline: Payment claim submitted
confirmation.body: Your payment claim has been submitted. The photographer will review it and you'll receive an email once approved.
confirmation.emailReminder: A confirmation has been sent to

profile.heading: Account Profile
profile.welcomeBanner: Welcome to RaceShots. Fill in your bank details so runners can pay you directly.
profile.loadError: Could not load your profile. Please refresh the page.
profile.displayNameHint: Shown to runners on your event pages.
profile.displayNameMaxLength: Display name must be 100 characters or fewer.

preferredLocale.label: Preferred language for emails
preferredLocale.hint: Controls the language of notifications sent to you.

bankSection.title: Bank Transfer Details
bankSection.subtitle: These details are shown to runners when they purchase your photos.

profile.bankNameMaxLength: Bank name must be 100 characters or fewer.
profile.bankAccountHolderMaxLength: Account holder name must be 100 characters or fewer.
profile.bankAccountNumberMaxLength: Account number must be 50 characters or fewer.
profile.bankInstructionsHint: Additional instructions shown to runners, e.g. reference format or bank branch details.
profile.bankInstructionsMaxLength: Payment instructions must be 500 characters or fewer.
